LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GARY ELDEMIR MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF-MOVING PARTY & (THRU COURT CALL) FOR DEFENDANT-OPPOSING PARTY. NO ARGUMENT.
